competencies: Apply advanced and non-relational database models
Compare data models for specialized application domains
Select appropriate database technologies for given workloads
Reason about modern data management concepts
description_en: An advanced course on database models and modern data management concepts taught through lectures and exercises.

competencies: Model curves and surfaces using parametric representations
Apply Bezier, B-spline and NURBS techniques for geometric design
Implement computer-aided geometric design algorithms
Construct and manipulate free-form geometry for CAD
description_en: A course on computer-aided geometric design covering curve and surface modeling for CAD applications.

competencies: Design and build data warehouse architectures
Model multidimensional schemas for analytical workloads
Implement ETL processes and OLAP operations
Apply data warehousing technologies for business intelligence
description_en: A course on data warehouse technologies covering multidimensional modeling, ETL and analytical query processing.

competencies: Design relational database schemas
Write and optimize SQL queries
Apply data modeling and normalization principles
Manage data with relational database systems
description_en: A core course on data management covering relational databases, data modeling and practical SQL exercises.

competencies: Formulate multi-objective optimization problems
Apply evolutionary algorithms to find Pareto-optimal solutions
Evaluate and compare evolutionary optimization methods
Solve complex optimization tasks with metaheuristics
description_en: A course on evolutionary algorithms for solving multi-objective optimization problems and finding Pareto-optimal solutions.

competencies: Apply structured creativity techniques to generate ideas
Develop and refine innovative concepts systematically
Evaluate and select promising ideas
Document idea development in a written assignment
description_en: A course teaching structured creativity and idea-generation techniques to systematically develop innovative concepts.

competencies: Design interactive user interfaces
Apply interaction design principles and techniques
Develop and prototype interactive systems
Evaluate usability of interactive applications
description_en: A course on the design and development of interactive systems, covering interaction techniques and user interface concepts.

competencies: Develop parallel programs using established paradigms
Apply shared-memory and distributed parallelization techniques
Analyze and optimize performance of parallel code
Implement concurrent algorithms on multicore and HPC systems
description_en: A course on parallel programming covering parallelization paradigms and performance optimization for multicore and HPC systems.

competencies: Develop a start-up concept within a team project
Apply entrepreneurship methods to validate business ideas
Plan and execute early-stage venture activities
Document and present a start-up project
description_en: A project module where students develop and advance a start-up concept applying entrepreneurship and venture-building methods.

competencies: Build decision support solutions in a project setting
Apply decision analysis and modeling methods
Translate business problems into decision support concepts
Document and present project results
description_en: A project module in which students develop a decision-support solution, applying decision analysis and venture methods.

competencies: Apply scientific and information visualization techniques
Design effective visual representations of data
Implement visualization pipelines and rendering methods
Evaluate and interpret visualizations critically
description_en: A course on data and scientific visualization covering techniques for creating effective visual representations of data.

competencies: Critically evaluate the limits of quantitative growth and sustainability paradigms
Analyze resource-related distributional conflicts
Compare sustainability strategies across regional and global scales
Assess governance approaches for natural resources
description_en: A seminar examining sustainability conflicts, the limits of growth and governance approaches for natural resources.

competencies: Analyze political frameworks and actors shaping sustainability transitions
Apply theories and empirical data of sustainability research
Evaluate environmental policy instruments and their relevance
Discuss sustainability policy in written and oral form
description_en: A course on the political frameworks, actors and instruments of sustainability policy, illustrated by German environmental policy.

competencies: Analyze the design and function of sports equipment
Evaluate materials and technologies used in sports devices
Assess performance characteristics of sports technology
Present technical sports-equipment topics in a seminar
description_en: A seminar introducing the technologies and materials used in sports equipment and their performance characteristics.

competencies: Analyze advanced sports-equipment technologies
Evaluate materials and construction of sports devices
Assess performance and biomechanical aspects of sports technology
Present technical sports topics in a seminar
description_en: A seminar on sports-equipment technology, continuing the study of materials, construction and performance of sports devices.

competencies: Analyze specialized sports-technology topics in depth
Evaluate materials and engineering of advanced sports devices
Assess technological developments in sports equipment
Present technical sports topics in a seminar
description_en: An advanced seminar exploring specialized topics in sports technology and the engineering of sports equipment.

competencies: Investigate advanced sports-technology research topics
Evaluate cutting-edge materials and methods in sports equipment
Assess innovations in sports technology critically
Present specialized sports topics in a seminar
description_en: An advanced seminar on selected research topics in sports technology and the engineering of sports devices.

competencies: Apply different forms of the Bernoulli equation to realistic flows
Distinguish and solve incompressible and compressible flows
Apply Navier-Stokes equations and similarity theory
Compute forces and torques induced by fluid flows
description_en: An advanced course on fluid dynamics covering Bernoulli relations, Navier-Stokes equations and compressible and turbulent flows.

competencies: Set up and run CFD simulations of complex flow problems
Apply finite difference, volume and element discretization methods
Critically analyze and validate CFD results
Use CFD software and supercomputing resources effectively
description_en: A hands-on course on computational fluid dynamics covering discretization methods, solvers and validation of flow simulations.

competencies: Model mechanical processes mathematically using statistical methods
Numerically solve ordinary differential equations for particle systems
Implement Monte-Carlo and stochastic solution methods
Develop and validate simulation programs for mechanical processes
description_en: A course on simulating mechanical processes using statistical methods, numerical ODE solvers and Monte-Carlo techniques.

competencies: Carry out a life cycle assessment for biofuels
Define system boundaries and apply cut-off and allocation rules
Select relevant impact categories for product systems
Use flow-sheet simulation to quantify energy and mass flows
description_en: A course on sustainability and life cycle assessment of biofuels, covering LCA methodology and renewable fuel production processes.

competencies: Solve matrix equations for linear and quadratic systems
Compute and approximate matrix functions
Apply randomized algorithms in numerical linear algebra
Select numerical methods for dense and structured problems
description_en: An advanced course on numerical linear algebra covering matrix equations, matrix functions and randomized algorithms.

competencies: Model dynamic systems with differential equations
Formulate and solve optimal control problems
Apply parameter estimation and test planning methods
Implement optimization algorithms efficiently
description_en: A course on modeling, simulation and optimization of dynamic systems, covering optimal control and parameter estimation.

competencies: Formulate machine learning problems as optimization tasks
Apply stochastic and deterministic gradient methods
Use penalization and regularization techniques
Implement optimization algorithms for SVMs and neural networks
description_en: An advanced course on optimization methods for machine learning, covering gradient methods and models such as SVMs and neural networks.

competencies: Implement numerical algorithms in a high-level language such as C
Analyze floating-point arithmetic and machine number errors
Use shell scripting and revision control for scientific software
Apply existing software packages in own numerical implementations
description_en: A course on the practical implementation of numerical algorithms, covering floating-point arithmetic, C programming and scientific software tools.

competencies: Simulate and analyze electrical networks in time and frequency domain
Apply analytical and numerical methods to magnetic circuits
Model mechanical systems as equivalent electrical networks
Simulate magnetic fields and combine network and field methods
description_en: A course on analytical and numerical methods for simulating and analyzing electrical networks and magnetic circuits.

competencies: Explain the system theory of imaging systems
Describe the physics of X-rays and computed tomography
Apply tomographic image reconstruction methods
Implement and correct reconstruction algorithms and artefacts
description_en: A course on computed tomography covering imaging system theory, X-ray physics and tomographic image reconstruction methods.

competencies: Model AC machines using space-vector representation
Design control loops for synchronous and asynchronous machines
Apply field-oriented control and direct torque control
Evaluate machine types and control methods for applications
description_en: A course on the control of AC drives covering space-vector modeling, field-oriented control and direct torque control.

competencies: Design and build sensor systems for a given application
Select sensors based on their functional principles
Acquire and microcontroller-based evaluation of measurement data
Test, document and present a sensor-based solution
description_en: A two-semester practical project in which students design, build and test sensor systems for selected application domains.

competencies: Explain functions and properties of digital communication systems
Apply modulation techniques such as ASK, PSK, FSK and OFDM
Calculate transmission bandwidth, data rate and error rates
Model wired and wireless digital communication channels
description_en: A course on digital communication systems covering modulation techniques, channel capacity and modern wired and wireless standards.

competencies: Analyze digital LTI systems using the Z-transform
Apply discrete and fast Fourier transforms to signals
Assess system stability and frequency response
Process stochastic signals using correlation and ARMA models
description_en: A course on digital signal processing covering Z-transforms, Fourier analysis and processing of deterministic and stochastic signals.

competencies: Apply vector analysis and integral theorems to field problems
Use Maxwell's equations and boundary conditions
Solve problems for static electric and magnetic fields
Analyze time-varying electromagnetic fields
description_en: A course on electromagnetic field theory covering Maxwell's equations, boundary conditions and static and time-varying fields.

competencies: Design analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog converters
Analyze phase-locked loops using linear models
Design and test digital circuits with programmable logic
Apply VHDL for digital circuit design
description_en: A course on electronic circuits covering data converters, phase-locked loops and the design and testing of digital circuits with VHDL.
